_comment: Copy to curious.config.json at your project root (optional). Merge order: defaults → this file → env vars.
_comment_cwd: Agent working directory; relative paths resolve from project root. Spec defaults to ./spec/SPEC.md unless specPath is set.
_comment_specPath: Override spec file path (relative to project root or absolute). Default: <projectRoot>/spec/SPEC.md.
_comment_runtime: local (default) or cloud. Cloud requires cloud.repos — experimental; see README Cloud runtime section.
_comment_cycleDelayMs: Milliseconds to pause between completed develop→review→sync cycles (0 = no delay).
_comment_maxCycles: Stop after N full develop→review→sync rounds (0 = unlimited). Applies to all run modes except single --once.
_comment_overseerEveryNCycles: Run overseer after every N completed task cycles (0 = disable interval trigger).
_comment_overseerOnReviewFailStreak: Run overseer after N consecutive review FAILs (0 = disable streak trigger).
_comment_settingSources: Cursor settings to load: project | user | team | mdm | plugins | all.
_comment_agentId: Stable Cursor agent id for resume across runs. Default: agent-curious-<project-slug>. Env: CURIOUS_AGENT_ID.
_comment_agentName: Display name when creating the agent. Default: curious-<project-slug>.
_comment_agentBranch: Git branch Curious checks out before bootstrap, roadmap, and run (default: curious). Env: CURIOUS_AGENT_BRANCH.
_comment_ensureAgentBranch: Set false to skip automatic branch switch. Env: CURIOUS_ENSURE_AGENT_BRANCH=false.
_comment_apiKey: Optional; prefer CURSOR_API_KEY env. Never commit real keys.
_comment_model: Ignored — all runs use composer-2.5 (fixed in src/model.ts).
_comment_cloud: Required when runtime is cloud. repos[].url required; startingRef optional. Not dogfood-tested in curious repo.
_comment_harvest: Fine-tuning export defaults. CLI `curious harvest` runs even when enabled is false.
